patch.value: Clean up stale closed tracker-item references in docs/ header lines
Six docs files carry 'Tracked documentation work: pm-1sb2/pm-3042/pm-r9gu' header lines pointing to closed items, implying active tracking and confusing agents that orient on headers.
Remove or replace the stale header lines (point to the living docs epic); keep docs/README history refs marked as closed; build+docs-skills pass.
